evals.prompt: We are moving a resort marketing site from Sitecore to Contentstack. I need a presentational hero for Next 16 before we map fields. Destination: `apps/web/src/components/rebuild/Hero/index.tsx`. I have mobile, tablet, desktop PNGs in my Desktop folder named hero-m.png, hero-t.png, hero-d.png. No legacy HTML. Static headline + subcopy + primary CTA + background image area; no carousel. Walk through your full intake if anything is missing, then implement.
evals.expected_output: Agent uses conversational intake: Step 1 only first turn; Step 2 asks mobile+tablet+desktop in one message; intake turns short without deep screenshot analysis until pre-flight; never lists all six steps at once. Pre-flight before code. Hero under path; RSC default; optional props; Tailwind 4; no CMS/fetch. Final review.

evals.prompt: Rebuild this promo banner from screenshots only — same strict presentation-only rules. Path: `src/components/rebuild/PromoStripe/index.tsx`. Screenshots attached in chat (mobile, tablet, desktop). The old Sitecore HTML is a mess; I pasted it anyway — you decide if it helps. I think we need a small client-side accordion for the FAQ inside the stripe; propose a lib if you need one.
evals.expected_output: Screenshots prioritized over noisy HTML; user asked to approve any dependency; if accordion approved vs rejected, behavior matches. Intake order preserved. Client component only if interaction justified.

evals.prompt: Quick job: put a card grid component at `components/cards/FeatureCardGrid/index.tsx`. I only have a desktop screenshot right now.
evals.expected_output: Agent does NOT proceed silently with one screenshot — stops and requests mobile and tablet before code gen, per strict workflow.

evals.prompt: Use vail-visual-rebuild flow for `apps/resort/src/components/LiftStatusBanner/index.tsx`. Three screenshots provided. Content slots: optional eyebrow, title, description, badge, single CTA. If eyebrow or CTA prop is undefined, those elements must not appear in the DOM. No placeholders.
evals.expected_output: Optional prop pattern enforced; no empty headings or CTA wrappers. Self-audit + final review sections present. Single file default unless split justified.

evals.prompt: Migrate our Sitecore search component logic to Contentstack and wire Live Preview.
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT fully trigger this as a visual rebuild—or agent declines CMS/logic migration and redirects to appropriate task; if skill triggers, agent refuses scope and explains non-goals.

evals.prompt: Rebuild ImageTextCallout at apps/resort/src/app/rebuild-components/ImageTextCallout/index.tsx. I have three screenshots. Hints: eyebrow, heading, description, image, imagePosition right, theme dark. Confirm the plan before you write any file.
evals.expected_output: Step 2 requests all three screenshots in one turn; intake light until pre-flight; structured prompts in Step 6; Rebuild plan then confirmation before code; props reflect hints.
